reasoning: The original Apple Vision Pro was launched in February 2024. For entirely new and complex product categories, Apple usually has a longer iteration cycle than its mature products (e.g., the Apple Watch took 17 months for its first update, and Vision Pro is arguably much more complex). Credible supply chain analysts and insiders, such as Ming-Chi Kuo and Mark Gurman, have consistently reported that the 'Vision Pro 2' is not slated for release until late 2026 or 2027. While there were rumors of a cheaper, non-Pro 'Apple Vision' model for late 2025, it is unclear if it would qualify as a 'successor that expands on' the original functions, as it was expected to have reduced capabilities. Furthermore, if the knowledge cutoff is November 9, 2025, and there hasn't been a major announcement (which Apple usually conducts in September or October for holiday releases), a surprise late December release is effectively unprecedented for a flagship Apple hardware line. Thus, the probability is near the absolute minimum.
